layout.progress_desc:
We analyze your unique traits to create 
a beautiful, one-of-a-kind Korean name.

landing.title_main:
Every Korean name holds 
a beautiful story.
landing.subtitle: Find a special name that is uniquely yours.

features.title: Customized Just for You
features.desc:
A special Korean name that reflects
your unique personality and values.

features.title: Deep Meaning Inside
features.desc:
Discover the beautiful story and meaning
behind each character.

features.title: Share & Keep Your Name
features.desc:
Download your name card as an image
to save and share with others.

features.title: Safe & Secure
features.desc:
Your information is completely protected
and is never stored.

step1.title: What gender would you like for your name?
step1.description: This is used to determine the range of recommended names.

step2.title: What kind of vibe do you want to be remembered for?
step2.description: This shapes the first impression your name gives off.

step3.title: Which trait describes you the best?
step3.description: This is an important factor that reflects your true personality.

step4.title: What kind of season or nature vibe would you like to capture?
step4.description: This adds deeper meaning and symbolism to your name.
